name: GCF Calculator
description: Find the Greatest Common Factor of two or more integers using the Euclidean algorithm.

fields.label: GCF (a, b)
fields.helpText: Greatest Common Factor via Euclidean algorithm

explanation:
## Greatest Common Factor

The GCF (also called GCD) is the largest integer that divides both a and b exactly.

### Euclidean Algorithm
Repeatedly replace (a, b) with (b, a mod b) until b = 0. The GCF is the final non-zero remainder.
